# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

# Chart.yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: webapp
version: 0.1.0
description: A Helm chart for our web application

# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1
image:
  repository: my-webapp-image
  tag: latest
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80
database:
  username: admin
  password: DefaultPass123

# templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: webapp
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: webapp
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: webapp
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
          env:
            - name: DB_USERNAME
              value: {{ .Values.database.username | quote }}
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              value: {{ .Values.database.password | quote }}

# templates/service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: webapp
spec:
  selector:
    app: webapp
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
